positive: A detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical tapestry featuring glowing bioluminescent deep-sea flora mixed with stylized crescent moons and lunar vines. The composition should be centrally arranged and highly decorative, with thick, clean silhouettes suitable for a dark apparel background. Use a limited, rich palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, amethyst purple, and shimmering gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and modern minimalist gothic illustration, designed with strong contrast and clean lines, ensuring high legibility when printed on fabric. Full coverage, decorative pattern.
